title: Coxeter diagrams and the Köthe's problem
abstract: A ring $Λ$ is called right Köthe if every right $Λ$-module is a direct sum of cyclic modules. In this paper, we give a characterization of basic hereditary right Köthe rings in terms of their Coxeter valued quivers. Also we give a characterization of basic right Köthe rings with radical square zero. Therefore we give a solution of the Köthe's problem in this cases.
comment: to appear in Canad. J. Math
